Royal Guard Lilkus  

Guard
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded June 6th, 2022 by Atlans

  • This mob spawns at +1307, +685, -22.25 on a balcony in the northmost room.
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

You say, 'Hail, Royal Guard Lilkus'

Royal Guard Lilkus says, 'You tread upon sacred ground, Human. None may go further unless they [have business with the Overlord]. Or, if you're looking to gain favor with the heretics and need a little coin, I have a [job] for you.'

You say, 'have business with the Overlord'

Royal Guard Lilkus says, 'The Overlord only sees those he calls forward. If you have a summons from him, I will escort you and announce your arrival. If not, then forget whatever business you may have had here. If you wish an audience, then go speak to Sheltian below. He may be able to help you...if you help him.'

Categories: Templatized | EverQuest
This page last modified 2022-06-25 14:50:48.

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2022-06-06 21:04:19

Known Habitats:
  Paineel
Factions Increased:
  Gate Callers +25
  Deepwater Knights +25
  Crimson Hands +25
  Craftkeepers +25
Factions Decreased:
  Heretics -25
Quests:
  Kobold Molars (evil)

Report a correction

Post Comment
Faction hits for kill
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2017 at 4:16 PM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts
[Fri Apr 28 18:15:21 2017] Your faction standing with Heretics has been adjusted by -25.
[Fri Apr 28 18:15:21 2017] Your faction standing with Deepwater Knights has been adjusted by 25.
[Fri Apr 28 18:15:21 2017] Your faction standing with Gate Callers has been adjusted by 25.
[Fri Apr 28 18:15:21 2017] Your faction standing with Craftkeepers has been adjusted by 25.
[Fri Apr 28 18:15:21 2017] Your faction standing with Crimson Hands has been adjusted by 25.
[Fri Apr 28 18:15:21 2017] You crush Royal Guard Lilkus for 41335 points of damage.
[Fri Apr 28 18:15:21 2017] You have slain Royal Guard Lilkus!
▲ Page top
Where is Sheltian?
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2008 at 10:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592269289146
Scholar
38 posts
OK, having lived in Paineel (Erudite Necro) close to all my seasons, I have yet to find this person Sheltian. Guard Sheltuin and Royal Guard Sheltuin just look at you as if you've dropped off another planet. So, if perchance some nice person finds this Sheltian, can you PLEASE let the rest of us know?
▲ Page top
Secondary Quest to follow?
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2006 at 7:09 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1607905031065
Scholar
403 posts
So I've been dinking around in the warrens trying to get the reclaim energy toy for my sk. After killing lots of kobolds, collecting teeth and getting faction I turned in a bunch of molar's to this guy. After the faction hits he said:

Not bad, Kassdax. Here is your reward. If you slay enough of these dogs, Sheltian may have a more important task for you to perform.

I searched all over for somebody named Sheltian. I found Guard Sheltuin but no mob with the name Sheltian. Is this a possible typo or has anybody heard of Sheltian?

Hailing Guard Sheltuin got me nowhere.
▲ Page top
Where he is
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2004 at 11:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252377003
View User Forum
46 posts
To find this guy you have to know where the teleporters are, if you know how to get to the top overwatch with the teleporter that has one teleport crystal on it's front and another teleport crystal on its back then your very close to him. On the back side of that teleporter is a sign that says Darkglow Palace: Official Business Only.. he's back there on 2nd floor.

To the other posters on this thread, please be more specific with your answers. Took me forever to find his /Loc using his position posted by Mescalero. But without that the other posts were useless, and I would have never found him.
▲ Page top
loc
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2004 at 2:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797141867
19 posts
He's at p1300 . p680 . n20 . up on a balcony. You also get small xp reward

where

is he in the darkglow palace or in another palace???

where is this guy?

# Mar 16 2001 at 1:42 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Upstairs in the Palace. He sends you to another guy who is downstairs below the balcony he is on.
